name: Crab Louis
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a bowl with lettuce leaves.
2. Place shredded lettuce at the bottom of the bowl.
3. Pile crabmeat on top of the shredded lettuce.
4. Drizzle with Louis Sauce, made by combining all ingredients except salt and pepper in a blender until well mixed.
5. Surround the mixture with slices of hard-cooked egg.
6. Sprinkle with chives or green onion.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
